zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Beaugency de Presles於1075年出生在法國巴-諾門迪時，她的父親Lancelin II de Beaugency36歲，母親Alberge du Maine38歲。她和Gauthier IV de Mayenne至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1125年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Beaugency de Presles于1075年出生在法国巴-諾門迪时，她的父亲Lancelin II de Beaugency36岁，母亲Alberge du Maine38岁。她和Gauthier IV de Mayenne至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1125年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Presles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Amnon, Aron, Nechama.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Pressler   1.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for someone who ironed clothes, from Yiddish pres ‘flat iron’ + the agent suffix -ler.

variants.name: Pressler
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the city of Breslau (compare   Bressler  ), or from Pressel (compare   Pressel  ). Compare also   Presler   1.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Beaugency de Presles was born in 1075, in Lower Normandy, France, her father, Lancelin II de Beaugency, was 36 and her mother, Alberge du Maine, was 38. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Gauthier IV de Mayenne. She died in 1125, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Beaugency de Presles est née en 1075, à Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Lancelin II de Beaugency, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alberge du Maine, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Gauthier IV de Mayenne. Elle est décédée en 1125, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Beaugency de Presles 1075 in Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lancelin II de Beaugency 36 und ihre Mutter Alberge du Maine 38. Sie hatte mit Gauthier IV de Mayenne mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1125 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Beaugency de Presles è nata il nel 1075 nel Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Lancelin II de Beaugency, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Alberge du Maine, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Gauthier IV de Mayenne. Morì nel 1125, nel Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Beaugency de Presles(이)가 1075년 프랑스 배세-노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lancelin II de Beaugency(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alberge du Maine(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Gauthier IV de Mayenne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1125년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Beaugency de Presles родилась в 1075 г. в местности бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Lancelin II de Beaugency было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alberge du Maine, 38. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Gauthier IV de Mayenne. Она умерла в 1125 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.
